source_name: Code4rena Ethena Findings and Analysis Report (2023-10)
finding_title: users still forced to follow previously set cooldownDuration even when cooldown is off (set to zero) before unstaking
summary: The StakedUSDeV2 contract can enforces coolDown periods for users before they are able to unstake/ take out their funds from the silo contract if coolDown is on. Based on the presence of the modifiers ensureCooldownOff and ensureCooldownOn, it is known that the coolDown state of the StakedUSDeV2 contract can be toggled on or off. In a scenario where coolDown is on (always turned on by default) and Alice and Bob deposits, two days after Alice wants to withdraw/redeem. Alice is forced to wait for 90 days before completing withdrawal/getting her tokens from the silo contract because Alice must call coolDownAsset()/coolDownShares() fcns respectively. Bob decides to wait an extra day.
root_cause: cooldown state transition bug: unstake requires a per-user cooldown expiry even after global cooldownDuration is set to zero
broken_invariants: when global cooldown is disabled, previously cooled-down users should be able to exit without waiting for stale per-user cooldown timestamps
admin changes to the global cooldown mode must be reflected consistently by all unstake/withdraw paths
stored user cooldown records must not keep funds locked after the protocol has turned cooldown off
attack_preconditions: the affected code version and configuration match the public report
the report-described function sequence or state condition is reachable
attacker_capability: external user or protocol participant able to trigger the affected flow
trigger_actions: observe accounting, access-control, or availability divergence

why_not_higher: the final report classified this as Medium; impact or likelihood is bounded relative to High severity
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: verify reachability under current roles, pause state, and integration configuration
check whether audited commit and line links match the code under review
check whether sponsor-side operational assumptions fully remove the exploit path
mitigations: Modify the code in unstake() fcn to allow for withdrawals from the silo contract when the contract’s coolDownDuration has become 0. ### Assessed type Error
